title: Range Reference (range-ref v2.0)
description: Deterministic reference to a specific artifact byte range with explicit artifact/source axis separation.

artifact_role.description: Machine-readable enum role for the artifact coordinate set.

repo_id.description: Optional repository identifier carried for callers that still need repo-scoped source resolution.

artifact_path.description: Path to the resolved artifact file used for byte-range extraction.

artifact_byte_start.description: Inclusive start byte offset in the artifact coordinate space.

artifact_byte_end.description: Exclusive end byte offset in the artifact coordinate space.

artifact_line_start.description: Inclusive start line in the artifact coordinate space.

artifact_line_end.description: Inclusive end line in the artifact coordinate space.

source_file_path.description: Path to the original source file coordinate space.

source_line_start.description: Inclusive start line in the source coordinate space.

source_line_end.description: Inclusive end line in the source coordinate space.

content_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the artifact content used to verify the resolved artifact bytes.

range_content_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the extracted byte range content.
